title: The Parts of the Vision Guide Window
description:
The Parts of the Vision Guide Window

The Parts of the Vision Guide Window

The Vision Guide window is the point and click environment where most of your vision development will take place.  An understanding of this window and its major parts is the first thing you will need to grasp in order to use Vision Guide.  The Vision Guide 8.0 window can be broken into the following major sections:

	Title
	 Bar
	Toolbar
	Flowchart
	Sequence and calibration
	 trees
	Image
	 Display
	Sequence,
	 Object and Calibration Windows
	Jog tab
	Run
	 Panel

Symbol	Item

a	Vision Guide
		 Title Bar

b	Vision Guide Toolbar

c	Image Display

d	Run Panel

e	Flow Chart

f	Sequence, Object and Calibration
		 Windows

g	Sequence and Clibration Trees

h	Jog Tab
